alert.name: ClickStack · SLO fast burn (14.4x)
alert.message: Availability has dropped below 98.56% over the last 5 minutes - that is a 14.4x burn of a 99.9% SLO (0.1% budget), which exhausts the monthly error budget in ~2 days. Fast-burn, page-worthy. See the SLO strip at the bottom of the Services - RED dashboard (availability, error budget, multi-window burn-rate table).
